title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese presents four Claude Code projects designed to increase productivity: an AI Board of Advisors, a niched command center, an AI-optimized personal website, and an internal operating system. The video encourages hands-on building rather than passive learning.
